name: Bailey the Hyena
description:
"Saddler, you're small-time." -Leon S. Kennedy, 2005.

NEW REF SHEET DROPPED SO THE GOOBER IS GETTING THE REMAKE TREATMENT

MUCH less timid than last time because that apparently wasn't accurate, but there's still a little bit of shyness just to satisfy the tops in my audience.

Still unfortunately br*tish ☹️

The Blacktail is the best pistol, if not non-bonus weapon overall in the RE4 remake, change my mind.

I made up a fake origin for him but it shouldn't matter much for roleplay. Have fun with the yeen.
creator: The Blevinator
